text: Artificial intelligence, or AI, is the ability of computers and machines to perform tasks that usually require human intelligence. This includes learning, problem-solving, and recognizing patterns. One important part of AI is machine learning, where computers improve at tasks by learning from data without being explicitly programmed for every step. A more advanced form is deep learning, which uses complex neural networks to process information similarly to the human brain. You already use AI in daily life— for example, when your phone suggests the next word in a message, when streaming services recommend movies, or when virtual assistants like Siri or Alexa answer your questions.
